title: We need to always see Search and Views options in the header
excerpt: Two of the more powerful basic features in Monday.com is the search bar, and the ability to customize views and easily switch between views.    The problem is that as soon as you start to scroll through a board, those tw…

posts.author: Jason (Jason Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Two of the more powerful basic features in Monday.com is the search bar, and the ability to customize views and easily switch between views. The problem is that as soon as you start to scroll through a board, those two features hide along with the rest of the header…and you can’t get back to them again until you fully scroll back to the top of the pulse list.

The header is big, especially if you use the description section, so hiding/minimizing some of that header makes sense. However, I’d propose you keep the last line of that header always visible (“views” dropdown, “search” field, and “filtering” buttons), no matter where you scroll in the pulses.

Thanks,
Jason

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed.

See previous similar feature request:

Freeze/make heading of board static Feature requests
Could you make the top header portion of boards static so that it doesn’t move as we scroll down through the groups. This would save time to always have this in view and accessible when wanting to add a new Group or integration or automation, or to search/filter, etc. 2019-08-05_1301

Hopefully this request makes it on to the Monday Roadmap one day.

posts.author: Larryr20 (Larry Rabinowitz)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed 100%. I use the search all the time due to a very large board. Scrolling takes a long time.!
